description.ko: 지각에 대한 상세한 지형학적 연구로, 퇴적층의 질감과 미네랄이 풍부한 광맥의 질감에 집중합니다.
description.en: A detailed topographical study of Earth's crust, focusing on the textures of sedimentary layers and mineral-rich mineral veins.

prompt: Hyper-realistic top-down satellite photography of TERRA-1, titled 'The Crystalline Fault.' A macro perspective of a tectonic rift where #8B4513 sienna and #D2691E ochre sedimentary layers reveal millions of years of geological pressure. Deep #2F4F4F slate mineral veins cut through the rock like frozen lightning, while sharp #F4A460 sand drifts fill the ancient crevices. The texture shows grain-level detail of oxidized minerals and crystallized salt deposits. Cinematic natural lighting with long, dramatic shadows. 8k resolution, emphasizing the raw, tactile narrative of the earth’s crust.
